title: Piglin companion
description: You can tame a piglin by a golden block. Piglin companion can take armor, weapons and bow and attack your enemies and monsters
body:
Piglin Companion – Your Loyal Piglin Sidekick!

This mod adds a tameable piglin companion who can wear armor, fight for you, and accompany you on your adventures.

🔹 Features:

- 	Tame the piglin using a gold block.
- 	Once tamed, it will protect the player from hostile mobs.
- 	Supports equipment swapping **(armor, swords, shields)**.
- 	Includes attack animations.
- 	Can be renamed with a name tag, and the name will appear above its head.
- 	Has custom **AI behavior**.
- 	Can be healed with gold **ingots, ore, blocks, or nuggets**.
- 	Includes a **leveling system**.

📦 Compatibility:

- Works on Minecraft 1.20 Forge.
- Compatible with most other mods.

⸻

Perfect for players who don’t like traveling alone — let the piglin become your loyal companion!
